parameters.query:
-- Daily diagnostic suite. Each test returns one diagnostic_history row.
-- Test categories follow SPEC §11 severity tiers.
WITH run AS (SELECT gen_random_uuid() AS run_id),
results AS (
  SELECT 'partition_overflow' AS test_id,
         CASE WHEN count(*) = 0 THEN 'ok' ELSE 'critical' END AS status,
         count(*)::text AS value,
         'rows in events_overflow' AS detail
    FROM events_overflow
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'next_partition_exists',
         CASE WHEN to_regclass('public.events_' || to_char((NOW() + INTERVAL '1 month')::date, 'YYYY_MM')) IS NOT NULL THEN 'ok' ELSE 'critical' END,
         to_char((NOW() + INTERVAL '1 month')::date, 'YYYY_MM'),
         'next month''s partition table'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'dead_letter_recent',
         CASE WHEN count(*) = 0 THEN 'ok' WHEN count(*) < 5 THEN 'warning' ELSE 'critical' END,
         count(*)::text,
         'dead-letters in last 24h'
    FROM dead_letter
   WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND pipeline != 'system_marker'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'stuck_processing_leases',
         CASE WHEN count(*) = 0 THEN 'ok' WHEN count(*) < 3 THEN 'warning' ELSE 'critical' END,
         count(*)::text,
         'events stuck >30 min in processing'
    FROM events
   WHERE status = 'processing' AND processing_started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'system_state',
         CASE WHEN value->>'state' = 'running' THEN 'ok' ELSE 'critical' END,
         value->>'state',
         'global kill-switch'
    FROM static_context WHERE key = 'system.state'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'audit_log_recent_activity',
         CASE WHEN count(*) = 0 THEN 'warning' ELSE 'ok' END,
         count(*)::text,
         'audit_log rows in last 24h (zero = pipelines silent)'
    FROM audit_log WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'pipeline_failure_rate_24h',
         CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 'ok'
              WHEN failures::float / total > 0.20 THEN 'critical'
              WHEN failures::float / total > 0.05 THEN 'warning'
              ELSE 'ok' END,
         CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN '0%'
              ELSE round(100.0 * failures / total, 1)::text || '%' END,
         failures::text || ' / ' || total::text || ' total'
    FROM (
      SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE result IN ('failure','fail','partial_failure')) AS failures,
             count(*)                                                                AS total
        FROM audit_log WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
    ) x
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'firing_alerts',
         CASE WHEN count(*) = 0 THEN 'ok'
              WHEN count(*) FILTER (WHERE severity = 'critical') > 0 THEN 'critical'
              ELSE 'warning' END,
         count(*)::text,
         'system_alerts with status=firing'
    FROM system_alerts WHERE status = 'firing'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'workflows_active',
         CASE WHEN count(*) >= 10 THEN 'ok' WHEN count(*) >= 5 THEN 'warning' ELSE 'critical' END,
         count(*)::text,
         'n8n workflows currently active'
    FROM workflow_entity WHERE active = true
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'rls_enforced',
         CASE WHEN count(*) FILTER (WHERE relrowsecurity) >= 8 THEN 'ok' ELSE 'critical' END,
         count(*) FILTER (WHERE relrowsecurity)::text || ' / ' || count(*)::text,
         'tables with RLS active'
    FROM pg_class
   WHERE relname IN ('emails','invoices','bank_transactions','events',
                     'epos_daily_reports','accommodation_daily_reports',
                     'till_reconciliation','child_events','rent_payments','documents','staff','cashflow_forecast')
)
INSERT INTO diagnostic_history (run_id, test_id, status, value, detail)
SELECT (SELECT run_id FROM run), test_id, status, value, detail
  FROM results
RETURNING run_id, test_id, status, detail;

INSERT INTO audit_log (pipeline, action, pipeline_version, result, ai_parsed)
VALUES ('diagnostics', 'daily_run', '1.0',
        CASE WHEN {{ $json.critical }} > 0 THEN 'failure'
             WHEN {{ $json.warning  }} > 0 THEN 'escalate'
             ELSE 'success' END,
        jsonb_build_object('run_id', '{{ $json.run_id }}',
                           'total',    {{ $json.total }},
                           'ok',       {{ $json.ok }},
                           'warning',  {{ $json.warning }},
                           'critical', {{ $json.critical }}))
RETURNING id;
